overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and cowboy hat walking along a rainy wooden dock in an industrial harbor. The character passes a large red paddlewheel steamboat and approaches industrial factory buildings with smokestacks while rain falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway alongside harbor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside a white-railed building with a red paddlewheel steamboat visible on the right

entered.detail: wooden building with white painted railings and porch columns running along the left side of the dock
large red and white paddlewheel riverboat with two black smokestacks moored alongside the dock
weathered wooden posts and pilings along the water's edge
tall factory smokestacks visible through the rain and mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rainy wooden dock beside a white-railed building. A large red paddlewheel steamboat is moored on the right, and industrial smokestacks are visible through the hazy rain in the distance. The dock is empty except for the steady rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial dock area with cargo and moored vessels

events.description: exits the covered building area into open dock space as the paddlewheel boat passes out of view behind
large white steamship with tall masts comes into view on the left side of the dock

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open dock past wooden benches and cargo crates toward the industrial factory area

entered.detail: large brick industrial buildings with multiple smokestacks dominating the skyline ahead
white steamship with tall masts and rigging moored alongside the dock
wooden benches and seating areas placed along the dock walkway
wooden crates and cargo containers stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open industrial dock area. The red paddlewheel boat falls behind as the character approaches a large white steamship with tall masts on the left. Industrial factory buildings with smokestacks loom ahead through the rain, and cargo crates line the wooden dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock approach with large moored vessel

events.description: approaching the stern of the large steamship as the dock narrows near the vessel

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large white steamship moored on the left, approaching the industrial buildings ahead

entered.detail: white superstructure and deck house of the steamship with stairs and railings

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dock approaching the large white steamship now close on the left. The industrial factory buildings draw nearer ahead, and the ship's deck structures become prominent. The wooden dock stretches forward through the steady rain toward the industrial harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy industrial dock that transitions from a moored paddlewheel boat toward a towering steamship and distant factories. It begins with the character walking beside a white-railed building, passing a large red paddlewheel steamboat while industrial smokestacks loom through the hazy rain. As the character emerges from the covered walkway into the open dock area, the red boat falls behind and the view expands to reveal cargo crates and a large white steamship with tall masts on the left. The scene then shifts closer to the steamship's prominent deck structures as the character advances further into the harbor. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the steady rainfall, drawing nearer to the looming factory buildings that dominate the horizon.
